adapters.label: Claude Code (reference)
adapters.install_hint: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code, then run `claude doctor` and ensure `claude` is on PATH.
adapters.description: Reference adapter proving the capability model expresses everything coven currently hardcodes as `harness_id == "claude"` (stream mode, preassigned session id, think, speed, sandbox mapping). Uses id `claude-example` so it does not collide with the built-in `claude` during validation demos.
